title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 89.
content:
There was an Old Man of Berlin,
    Whose form was uncommonly thin;
    Till he once, by mistake,
    Was mixed up in a cake,
    So they baked that Old Man of Berlin.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 89."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
